instruction: Write a FreeMarker template that renders a changelog from `releases`, each with `version`, `date`, and nested `changes` list. Format dates as medium strings. Escape version labels and change descriptions.
code:
<#-- Model: releases: [{ version, date, changes: [string] }] -->
<#list releases![] as release>

${release.version?html} ${release.date?string.medium}

    <#list release.changes![] as change>
  • ${change?html}
